title: JavaScript Strings Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of creating, manipulating, and using strings in JavaScript.

questions.question: Which of the following is correct syntax for creating a template literal?
Are strings mutable in JavaScript (meaning you can change the character directly at an index like str[0] = 'a')?
options: Yes, but only if defined with 'let'.

questions.question: Which property can you use to get the number of characters in a string?
What does the .split(',') method return when applied to a string with commas?
Which method should you use to return a part of a string without modifying the original?
